mano_cua.result_summary: Wuffle是基于Probot的GitHub App看板应用，需要GitHub App凭据（APP_ID, PRIVATE_KEY, WEBHOOK_SECRET）才能启动。没有这些凭据无法启动后端服务，前端board也无法独立运行。无法部署测试环境验证task list勾选后消失的bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Probot-based GitHub App requires APP_ID, PRIVATE_KEY, WEBHOOK_SECRET to start. Cannot deploy without GitHub App credentials.
